goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee', 'area', and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should 'leave after 08:00' and should leave on 'friday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get entrance fee, area, and phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to london liverpool street
The train should leave after 08:00 and should leave on friday
Make sure you get price and arrival time
